Frequently asked questions for Phoenix junk car pickups

Valley Intell.

Index Filters

Protocol Response

How fast can you pick up my car?

Call now and we can usually dispatch the nearest tow partner within 1-3 hours for Phoenix, Mesa, Tempe, Chandler, Glendale, and Scottsdale. Expedited requests are handled as available.
Verified Info
